disclaimer: Planning ranges for LA market, contractor all-in (labor+material) unless noted. All figures [EST] - validate against sub quotes before fixed bids. Edit this file to tune the book.

benchmark.notes: LA demo contractors quote $1,500-$5,000 depending on scope/access; national $500-$2,500 runs well below LA due to disposal fees and labor rates.
Semi-custom 10x12 kitchen runs $7K-$15K nationally ($150-$700/lf); LA labor/material 20%+ higher per Bradco LA guide.
Labor $50-$200/lf national x ~24 lf typical kitchen, adjusted +20% for LA; book range confirmed.
LA-specific: $67.80-$130.80/sf installed (Handoff LA); Apex LA cites $70-$100/sf average. Book range confirmed.
National $15-$40/sf (Angi), Homewyse $28-$50/sf; adjusted ~+20% for LA. Glass/mosaic pushes the high end.
Homewyse $935-$1,138 per piping run x 3 runs (sink/DW/fridge); LA guides cite $3K-$8K when permit triggers fixture work; book range confirmed, high end raised for LA.
LA disposal install alone $320-$776 (Handoff), faucet labor ~$260, sink set ~$350-$500; sum of labor-only components since fixtures are excluded.

items.description: Kitchen electrical (recessed cans, dedicated circuits, under-cabinet)

benchmark.notes: 6 recessed cans $700-$1,650 + $500-$1,000 per dedicated circuit (kitchen needs 4-5) + under-cabinet + Title 24 JA8 compliance pushes LA kitchens to $2.5K-$7K.
Composite: repair avg $296-$928 + texture match $100-$300/patch + repaint, LA-adjusted; book range roughly confirmed.
Set of 4 hookups: DW $150-$300 + fridge $100-$250 + range $100-$200 + hood replacement $300-$850, LA-adjusted; book low ($500) is ~1.4x under sourced range.
National $500-$2,000 ($5-$12/sqft to gut) adjusted +20% for LA labor and disposal; tile/mortar-bed showers push the high end.
Pan replacement $900-$2,300 national avg $1,620 (Angi); shower waterproofing scope $800-$2,500 (HomeAdvisor); LA-adjusted. Book high end slightly rich but defensible.
Fixr: $1,800-$5,000 avg $2,700 for 3x4 shower w/ 8-ft walls national; +20% LA. Book range confirmed.
LA-specific 2026 range $1,200-$3,000; 1/2-in glass, neo-angle or out-of-plumb walls in older LA homes push past $3,200.
HomeGuide: $400-$1,700 premade installed, $1,000-$4,000 custom; LA-adjusted. Book range sits at mid-to-custom tier, fine.
Fixr national $2K-$10K; new shower valve $225-$750; each relocated fixture adds $1K-$3K ($500-$1,500 extra on slab); LA adds ~20%.
Homeguide $350-$800 unit + labor for standard two-piece; LA labor premium pushes to $400-$900; smart/one-piece units go far higher.
Bath electrical bundle $500-$5,500 nationally; exhaust fan <$500 installed + $150-$400 dedicated circuit + $200-$500 per moved fixture location; 20A GFCI circuit required.
Small bath (~40-60 sf) at LA $10-$25/sf installed = $500-$1,500 + demo/prep; book low ($1,000) is ~1.7x above sourced floor — not >2x but book skews high.
National avg ~$300 ($150-$900); large/primary bath $600-$1,200; national figures, LA runs 15-25% higher so GC minimums keep the floor ~$300.

2026-07 accuracy audit: Two 2026 LA-specific sources put garage conversions at $250-400/sqft and $300-500/sqft (calculated from $120-220K totals on 400-500sqft garages); current $200-400 undershoots both the low and high end.
benchmark.auditNote: Two 2026 LA-specific sources put garage conversions at $250-400/sqft and $300-500/sqft (calculated from $120-220K totals on 400-500sqft garages); current $200-400 undershoots both the low and high end.

items.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: Two 2026 LA-specific sources put garage conversions at $250-400/sqft and $300-500/sqft (calculated from $120-220K totals on 400-500sqft garages); current $200-400 undershoots both the low and high end.

benchmark.notes: 2026 LA guides: $300-$550/sqft all-in (design, permits, construction); LuxDev cites $400-$650/sqft fully permitted; floor is ~$250/sqft for large (1,200 sqft) units. Typical totals $219K-$459K. Site gotchas: new electrical service $8K-$25K, hillside foundations +$30K-$80K.

LA ground-level additions run $200-$400/sqft (avg ~$285); most 2025 LA sources quote $250-$400, up to $300-$600 for complex/bathroom-heavy scopes. Building UP (second story / over garage) is $400-$600/sqft, Angi cites up to $600-$1,000 - see separate new item.

Stacked from LA ADU guides: design/architecture $8K-$25K + structural engineering $3K-$8K + Title 24 report $2K-$5K allowance + LADBS permit fees $6K-$15K (plan check $500-$5K, building permit $450-$15K by valuation). Pre-approved city Standard Plans can save $10K+ and 2-4 months. Soft-cost item, laborShare not applicable.
LA tear-off + architectural comp: $6.50-$10/sqft (LA guide) and $6-$9/sqft (CA Modernize) = $550-$1,000/square; book's $450-$700 reads low for 2026 LA.

items.description: Tile lift + relay w/ new underlayment

benchmark.notes: SoCal lift-relay ~$4-$9/sqft all-in (labor $3-$6 + underlayment $1-$3; OC underlayment $2-$4/sqft); book $800-$1,400/sq sits ~1.5x above sourced range - keep high end only for steep/2-story mudded tile.
LA torch-down $4-$8/sqft installed; TPO $4-$10/sqft with SoCal 10-20% premium; small sections price toward the top.
National $100-$135/sheet installed incl. material; CA labor runs 30-50% above national so LA add-on during reroof lands $100-$180/sheet.
LA interior repaint $2.75-$5/sqft of floor (walls/ceilings/trim); older homes add $0.50-$0.75/sqft prep; matches book.
LA stucco exterior $2.50-$6.50/sqft of wall; per floor sqft a 2,000 sqft house runs $3,500-$7,000 ($1.75-$3.50) before heavy prep - book's $3-$5/sqft floor is the with-prep GC price.
2026-07 accuracy audit: LA sources show $2,500-6,500 and $4,800-7,500 (incl. new 2026 CEC surge-protection device requirement); high end of benchmark was underselling current cost, raised to 7500.
benchmark.auditNote: LA sources show $2,500-6,500 and $4,800-7,500 (incl. new 2026 CEC surge-protection device requirement); high end of benchmark was underselling current cost, raised to 7500.

items.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: LA sources show $2,500-6,500 and $4,800-7,500 (incl. new 2026 CEC surge-protection device requirement); high end of benchmark was underselling current cost, raised to 7500.

benchmark.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: LA-specific breakdown by home size runs ~$7-18/sqft (small homes $8-12, large/knob-and-tube $11-18); benchmark's $10 ceiling was too low, widened to 6-15.
benchmark.auditNote: LA-specific breakdown by home size runs ~$7-18/sqft (small homes $8-12, large/knob-and-tube $11-18); benchmark's $10 ceiling was too low, widened to 6-15.

items.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: LA-specific breakdown by home size runs ~$7-18/sqft (small homes $8-12, large/knob-and-tube $11-18); benchmark's $10 ceiling was too low, widened to 6-15.

benchmark.notes: Handoff LA: $196-$375/ea, avg $225; national $100-$300; book top of $250 is slightly low for LA.
LA County typical $1,800-$2,800 incl permit; long conduit runs add $500-$1,500; excludes panel upgrade ($1,500-$4,000); LADWP rebate up to $1,000.
LA repipe specialists quote $4K-$5K incl drywall patch for 2-bath; national $3.5K-$11K (1,500-2,500 sqft); GC-marked-up book range confirmed.
Angi LA avg $1,740 ($1,140-$2,410); SoCal code-compliant (expansion tank, seismic straps, permit) 50-gal gas runs $2,200-$4,000.
LA projects $3,200-$7,680, typical ~$4,864; conversion needs 3/4-in gas line ($350-$2,000 upgrade) + new venting; LA plumbers $130-$200/hr.
LA trenchless projects avg $3,294 ($2,158-$6,816); spot repairs at $135-$285/ft trenchless or dig-and-replace for short sections; permits $150-$500.
LA gas furnace + 14-18 SEER2 AC $9K-$15K; 4-ton systems $11K-$20K+; LA labor $120-$200/hr, permits $250-$1,000; book high end raised for 4-ton.
LA single-zone installed $3,500-$6,500 (EA Mechanical), $2,500-$6,000/zone per Angi LA; includes dedicated circuit + disconnect; book range confirmed.
LA full ductwork $5K-$12K (Cold Cloud); $25-$55/lf remove+replace, ~100 lf typical home; Angi LA avg $1,899 covers partial jobs only; book slightly low for full replacement w/ Title 24 + HERS.
National $3.50-$9/sf installed (materials $2-$5 + labor $1.50-$4); +20% LA. Book range confirmed.
HomeGuide: engineered $9-$20/sf installed national (material $4-$12 + labor $3-$10); +15% LA. Book high end slightly conservative.
LA-specific: $4-$8/sf sand+stain+finish (CMC LA, Angi LA); dustless method $6-$8/sf. Book range confirmed.
LA-specific: $10-$25/sf installed due to elevated labor (labor alone $5-$10/sf); book high end ($18) undershoots LA large-format/porcelain work.
National $1.60-$3.75/sf level-4 installed; coastal metros $2.50-$4.00/sf; texture add $0.80-$2.00/sf. Book range confirmed for LA.
CA retrofit vinyl $700-$1,100/opening installed; must meet Title 24 CZ9 (U<=0.30, SHGC<=0.23); book confirmed.
LA installed vinyl slider $1,200-$2,500 typical, $1,094-$2,988 full range incl. haul-off; book's $3,500 top is premium/oversize units.
Simple patches $8-$20/sqft, SoCal at the high side; expect $650-$1,000 minimum mobilization in LA; texture/color match drives the spread.
LA reinforced flatwork $8-$15/sqft; plain gray driveway $12-$16; seismic rebar requirements add $1-$3/sqft vs non-seismic markets; hillside lots run $13-$20+.

CA-installed retaining walls run $60-$150/LF (2025); a ~3ft CMU wall with footing, rebar and drainage in LA lands $100-$250/LF -- the current book's $250-$450 reads like a 4-6ft engineered/permitted wall, not a 3ft wall.
benchmark.reviewNote: 2026-07 accuracy audit: proposed $25-65/LF rejected — unit confusion (per-sqft-face/material-only figures); installed 3ft CMU wall in LA holds at $100-250/LF

benchmark.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: $12-$22/sqft installed LA. installartificial cites $9-$25 ($9-20 realistic planning); LA installers cluster $13-$22. $12 floor = budget product tier; sub-$12 quotes usually mean thin base prep.
benchmark.auditNote: 2026-07 audit: $12-$22/sqft installed LA. installartificial cites $9-$25 ($9-20 realistic planning); LA installers cluster $13-$22. $12 floor = budget product tier; sub-$12 quotes usually mean thin base prep.

items.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: 2-$22/sqft installed LA. installartificial cites $9-$25 ($9-20 realistic planning); LA installers cluster $13-$22. $12 floor = budget product tier; sub-$12 quotes usually mean thin base prep.

benchmark.notes: LA 6ft cedar/redwood privacy fence installed; redwood dog-ear from an LA fence co. starts ~$51/LF, pressure-treated pine lands near the low end.
SoCal 6ft vinyl privacy runs $40-$75/LF installed (Ergeon $45-$74); CA averages ~25% above national vinyl pricing.
Standard EBB bolt-only scope $3,000-$7,000; crawl-space access and house size drive it; EBB grant rebates $3,000 (up to $10,000 income-eligible) offset homeowner cost.
85% of LA boltdown+bracing jobs land $5,000-$15,000; adding plywood sheathing to cripple walls adds ~$5,000 and 3-5 days over bolt-only.
Coating-only: liquid membrane $4-$6/sqft, sheet systems $6-$12; full membrane replacement $25-$40; book's $14-$25 assumes tear-off + new system - price by tier.
2026-07 accuracy audit: National interior (non-structural) demo runs $2-8/sqft; with a +15-25% LA labor adjustment that lands near $3-9/sqft vs benchmark's higher $4 floor.
benchmark.auditNote: National interior (non-structural) demo runs $2-8/sqft; with a +15-25% LA labor adjustment that lands near $3-9/sqft vs benchmark's higher $4 floor.

items.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: National interior (non-structural) demo runs $2-8/sqft; with a +15-25% LA labor adjustment that lands near $3-9/sqft vs benchmark's higher $4 floor.

benchmark.notes: LA 20-yd roll-off $590-$1,190/wk (budget providers from $495); overage $75/ton plus $20-$40/day street permit -- current book $450-$700 is below 2025-26 LA street rate.
Blown-in fiberglass/cellulose $1.75+/sqft at R-38 depth (11-14 in); West Coast labor at the high end of national range; book range confirmed with LA bump.
LA sectional steel 2-car door $1,300-$2,900 + opener $500-$1,200 + labor $300-$800; book confirmed.
LA seamless aluminum $6-$20/LF installed incl. downspouts; typical LA project $1,022-$1,590; 2-story and corner-heavy roofs price high.
EnergySage LA avg $3.14/W gross; LA range $2.70-$3.40/W, marketplace lows to ~$2.40/W; note 30% federal ITC for cash/loan expired 12/31/2025 — gross price is now the homeowner price.

National data: quartz $7K-$10K; pebble $7K-$15K, Pebble Tec up to $8K-$20K for large pools; adjusted to LA (+15-25% typical for SoCal labor). LA-specific quotes for polished pebble/quartz aggregate run to $10K+. Standard white plaster is cheaper; pebble upgrade adds $8K-$13K over base plaster.

LADBS fees are valuation-based (~1-2% of construction value): kitchen remodel permits $800-$2,500, bathroom $500-$1,800 (2026). Plan check adds ~85-90% of the building permit fee when required (LAMC 91.107.6). Express permits (no plan check) are far cheaper. Fee item, laborShare not applicable.

National 2025 data: $274-$707 (avg $477) per HomeAdvisor; $500-$800 (avg $650) per Angi; $0.15-$0.60/sqft. Adjusted up ~20% for LA labor rates (national data, no LA-specific source found). Labor is ~90% of cost per HomeAdvisor. Add $100-$300 if debris disposal included.

GC fees run 10-20% of project cost overall; standalone construction-management/supervision fees run 5-15% of total cost (or $50-$150/hr). 8-15% is a defensible supervision/PM line on LA residential remodels; smaller jobs skew to the high end to cover fixed overhead.
National $2-$7/sqft adjusted for LA disposal fees; rebar/reinforced adds $1-$3/sqft; commonly quoted ahead of paver or new-driveway jobs.

LA stamped patio quotes $20-$30/sqft; simple single-pattern/single-color work starts mid-teens, multi-color borders and bands hit $30.

benchmark.notes: LA push-pier systems $1,500-$3,000 per pier with typical homes needing 8-15 piers; whole-job underpinning commonly $10,000-$25,000 in LA.

benchmark.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: Full scope (lift+demo+re-pour) runs $50k-100k+ nationally (lifting $10-40k + foundation $25-40k); Golden Retrofit's own LA page cites $20k-$100k+. Old $25k-60k undercounts the combined-scope high end.

benchmark.notes: LA complete installs $3,000-$12,000; operator alone $1,800-$4,750, keypad $250-$650; sloped hillside driveways and trenching for power drive the top end.

items.description: Wrought iron / ornamental steel fence, installed [EXT]

benchmark.notes: National $50-$85/LF installed ($85-$130 custom ornamental) adjusted +15-20% for LA labor; height and picket detail set the range.

items.description: Whole-house copper repipe (2-bath house), Type L, incl. drywall repair [EXT]

benchmark.notes: Copper runs 58-68% more than PEX; LA 2-bath copper repipe $8K-$18K depending on access; natural upsell line next to the PEX item.

items.description: Trenchless sewer lateral replacement (CIPP lining or pipe burst) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: LA trenchless $90-$400/lf sourced; typical band $135-$285/lf; add LA Bonded Sewer Fee $74/lf for new line in public right-of-way.

items.description: Seismic (earthquake) gas shutoff valve supplied + installed, incl. permit [EXT]

benchmark.notes: Mandatory at point of sale in City of LA; valve $150-$500 + labor $150-$400; standard installs ~$450 all-in.
$500-$1,500 attached / $1,000-$3,000 detached nationally; CA metro $1,200-$2,000; trenching adds $6-$13.50/ft.

benchmark.notes: National $300-$800 installed; +15% LA labor adjustment; 1-2 hr job, common add-on during panel upgrades.

items.description: Ducted heat pump conversion (replaces furnace + AC, existing ducts) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: LA/Ventura equipment-swap $8,500-$13,500; full ducted systems $12K-$22K CA; panel upgrade if needed adds $2K-$4.5K; TECH/LADWP rebates often exhausted — verify before quoting.

benchmark.notes: Skim coat $1.00-$1.30/sf national; full level-5 spec $1.75-$3.50/sf; LA-adjusted. Standard ask on LA smooth-wall remodels.

items.description: Frame new interior partition wall, non-load-bearing (framing + drywall) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: HomeGuide: framing+drywall $25-$64/lf national (framing labor $7-$13/lf); LA-adjusted; excludes electrical.
LA-specific: Angi LA avg $3,408, typical range $1,704-$9,088; waterproofing $800-$2,500 and haul-off $300-$800 within scope.

items.description: Frameless glass shower enclosure supplied + installed [EXT]

benchmark.notes: National avg $1,400, typical $1,000-$2,500 installed (up to $3,500+ custom); adjusted +15-20% for LA.

items.description: Existing lawn/sod removal and disposal (prep for turf install) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: National 2025-26: sod removal $0.50-$2.00/sqft including disposal (GreenPal avg $0.95-$1.75). LA jobs land mid-to-high in the range given disposal/haul costs; no LA-specific per-sqft source found.

items.description: Backyard putting green, synthetic - supplied and installed [EXT]

benchmark.notes: 2025 data: $15-$40/sqft installed; $20-$30/sqft typical for greens 400+ sqft, over $30/sqft for smaller greens. HomeAdvisor project average $4,300 (range $3,500-$9,000). Contours, bunkers, tee boxes billed extra ($50-$100/hr).

items.description: Pet turf system (antimicrobial turf, deodorizing infill, enhanced drainage) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: $10-$20/sqft installed for pet-friendly systems (design, materials, labor); premium tiers $12-$15+ with odor-control infill and drainage layers. Typical 500 sqft pet lawn: $5K-$10K. InstallArtificial is an LA-market installer.

items.description: New inground gunite/concrete pool, standard design (SoCal) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: SoCal builders: $85K-$150K for a standard rectangular/freeform gunite pool with basic finish, tile/coping, simple deck and equipment. Complex designs, spas, water features or automation run $150K-$250K+; LA high-end can exceed $500K. National gunite average is $90K-$140K ($100-$280/sqft).

items.description: Inground spa added during pool construction (gunite spa combo upcharge) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: Inground hot tub/spa costs $6K-$15K when built concurrently with the pool (HomeGuide); heated gunite spa with automation can add ~$20K in high-cost markets (Blue Haven). National figures - LA typically toward the top of range.

2026-07 accuracy audit: 2026 sources show coping install at $40-$80/lf by material (concrete low, natural stone high) plus $5-$12/lf for replacement demo/removal, i.e. ~$40-$90/lf; benchmark's $15-$50 floor is stale-low.

benchmark.notes: Replacement $1,500-$6,000 by type/size; HomeAdvisor average $3,040 installed ($1,827-$4,253). Heat pumps $2,500-$7,500; solar $2,500-$9,500. Pool pump replacement is a separate $300-$1,600 line. National data; LA gas-line work adds cost.

items.description: Pool demolition/removal (partial or full) with backfill and grading [EXT]

benchmark.notes: LA-specific: $12,000-$19,500 average; partial fill-in cheaper than full removal/haul-off. Tight LA lot access is the biggest cost driver. 5-10 business days typical; demolition permit $0-$1,000 extra depending on jurisdiction.

items.description: Kitchen remodel (LA) - minor refresh through major layout change [EXT]

benchmark.notes: LA 2025 tiers: minor refresh $25K-$40K; mid-range (new cabinets/counters/appliances) $50K-$85K; major renovation with layout changes $85K-$150K+. Most LA kitchens land $50K-$60K. $250-$600+/sqft; cabinetry is 30-40% of budget.

items.description: Bathroom remodel (LA) - secondary bath through primary suite [EXT]

benchmark.notes: 2026-07 accuracy audit: $22k-$65k. Secondary/guest baths ~$22k-40k (GreatBuildz/ESV); primary suites $40k-70k (ESV $35-70k). Agent-proposed $85k top rejected as luxury-spa tier.

items.description: Architectural design fees, room addition or major remodel (LA) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: Angi LA: average $12,488, most projects $4,155-$21,494. Percentage-fee alternative for additions/remodels runs 12-20% of construction cost. Small remodels $2,840-$8,520 flat-fee.

Angi LA average $1,249 (typical $549-$2,134); HomeGuide: $500-$3,000 for residential plans, $2,200-$3,700 of a home-addition budget goes to engineering. Two-story ADUs in LA have been quoted far higher ($15K-$20K forum reports) - scope-dependent.

items.description: Title 24 energy compliance report (CF1R) for addition/ADU/remodel [EXT]

benchmark.notes: Flat-fee services: $245 for residential projects under 3,000 sqft ($395+ above), $275 for ADUs under 750 sqft, $325 under 3,500 sqft; 3-5 day turnaround, corrections included. Note: full-service ADU guides bundle this at $2K-$5K when purchased through design firms.

Modified soil report (accepted by LA and Glendale for garage-conversion ADUs) ~$1,500, 1-2 weeks. Full geotechnical report $7K-$9K, 3 weeks-2 months. LA hillside investigations with borings and lab testing run $8K-$25K+. LADBS requires geotech before structural on hillside/grading jobs (LAMC 91.7006.2).

items.description: Tankless water heater installation / tank-to-tankless conversion [EXT]

benchmark.notes: LA 2025: full conversion $2,400-$4,200 (CA source); LA installs typically $3,200-$7,680 (~$4,864 typical, Project Cost Atlas); Angi LA average $2,668 ($1,616-$3,829 for simpler swaps). Gas-line upsizing and venting drive the spread; plumber rates $130-$200/hr on gas work.

LA: $90-$400/lf (Angi LA), $135-$285/lf per Reliant; typical LA job $2,158-$6,816 (avg ~$3,294), full replacements $3K-$20K by depth/length. Sewer permits add $360-$1,000+. Trenchless can be ~50% cheaper than open-trench in hardscaped LA yards.

items.description: Roll-off dumpster rental for remodel debris (10-40 yd, LA) [EXT]

benchmark.notes: LA 2026: 10-yd $425-$750; typical rentals $425-$820; 40-yd $590-$1,190. Add $50-$150 for landfill charges, overage, extra days, street-placement permits.
